offer: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units, inefficient rent collection causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent collection and maintenance requests instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Inefficient rent collection and maintenance request management
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try maintenance request tracking and financial statements on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
